top_signals.title: Oil Rises From Six-Week Low Amid Uncertainty Over US-Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: Oil rose from a six-week low amid uncertainty over the outlook for a peace deal to end the war in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: This Trump-linked startup plans to put humanoid robots in the military
top_signals.summary: With ties to the Trump family,  Foundation Robotics Labs is aiming to deploy humanoid robots in the military in the next 12 to 18 months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: A hotly debated lung cancer drug cut the risk of death by 34% in a late-stage trial in China
top_signals.summary: An experimental lung cancer drug from Akeso and Summit Therapeutics reduced the risk of death by 34% in a late-stage trial, according to data released Sunday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Myanmar's retail industry under pressure as fuel supplies dry up
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Disney is poised to ramp its already booming advertising business. Rita Ferro is behind the push
top_signals.summary: Disney is selling ads for the Super Bowl, Oscars and Grammys in 2027, all major advertising revenue drivers. Global ad president Rita Ferro is leading the charge.
